description: Nuxt-native decision packs and best-practice rule packs for AI execution. Complements docs, not a replacement.

packs.title: Abstraction Disambiguation
packs.focus: Choose Nuxt-owned abstractions before generic Vue, raw HTML, or ad hoc glue code.
triggers: A generic Vue or HTML fix looks plausible
You need to decide whether Nuxt, Nuxt Content, or Nuxt UI already owns the surface

packs.title: Page Meta, Head, and Layout
packs.focus: Separate page behavior, document metadata, and layout structure before editing.
triggers: Pages, layouts, middleware, or page options
Title, meta tags, canonical URLs, or OG metadata

packs.title: Error Surfaces and Recovery
packs.focus: Cover both global and local error boundaries and use the right recovery utilities.
triggers: Global error pages or local error boundaries
Recovery flows, clearError, showError, or fallback UI

packs.title: Content Modeling and Navigation
packs.focus: Model structured records correctly and use collection and navigation primitives before manual assembly.
triggers: Nuxt Content collections, JSON or YAML records, or generated navigation
Sidebar, docs navigation, or content-derived listings

packs.title: Nuxt UI Primitives
packs.focus: Prefer first-class Nuxt UI surfaces and their current API shape before hand-rolled markup.
triggers: Tables, forms, modals, command palettes, dropdowns, or page chrome
A custom HTML implementation looks visually correct but framework-owned primitives exist

packs.title: Verification and Finish
packs.focus: Verify the intended framework behavior and re-check paired surfaces before concluding work.
triggers: The fix spans more than one surface
You are about to finish a Nuxt change and need to confirm the right abstraction

packs.title: Data Fetching and SSR
packs.focus: Deduplication, payload correctness, and request-safe loading.
triggers: Pages, layouts, or composables fetching initial data
SSR-visible content or hydration-sensitive state

packs.title: Hydration and SSR Consistency
packs.focus: SSR/CSR determinism, client-only boundaries, and mismatch prevention.
triggers: Hydration warnings or client-only rendering
State that differs between server and browser

packs.title: Architecture Boundaries
packs.focus: Server-only secrets, request isolation, and safe shared abstractions.
triggers: Crossing server/client boundaries
Composable or utility architecture changes

packs.title: Server Routes and Runtime Config
packs.focus: Runtime config exposure, env handling, and route-level contracts.
triggers: nuxt.config, runtime config, or env wiring
Server route config and public/private config exposure

packs.title: Nitro and h3 Server Patterns
packs.focus: Handler contracts, caching, and edge-safe server behavior.
triggers: Server routes, middleware, Nitro plugins, or h3 handlers
API behavior, caching, or edge runtime concerns

packs.title: Plugins and Runtime Boot
packs.focus: Plugin ordering, startup cost, and app/runtime initialization.
triggers: Plugins, app boot logic, or injected runtime helpers
Global runtime behavior changes

packs.title: Performance and Rendering
packs.focus: Rendering strategy, payload cost, and lazy loading tradeoffs.
triggers: Performance regressions or rendering strategy changes
Link, asset, and bundle cost decisions

packs.title: Module Authoring Conventions
packs.focus: Nuxt Kit patterns, module lifecycle, and ecosystem-safe authoring.
triggers: Writing or refactoring a Nuxt module
Module install/setup conventions

packs.title: Migrations and Compatibility
packs.focus: Incremental upgrades, compatibility boundaries, and rollout safety.
triggers: Upgrades, deprecations, or breaking behavior changes
Compatibility fixes across Nuxt versions
